_meta.title: NOVIQ Engine — DCL Exclusion Knowledge Base
_meta.source: AR-DRG V11.0 Final Report, IHACPA, January 2023 — Section 3.7.1 and Appendix A Table A5
_meta.description: ICD-10-AM codes excluded from the Episode Clinical Complexity (ECC) Model in AR-DRG V11.0. Codes here cannot receive a Diagnosis Complexity Level (DCL) and must not contribute to the Episode Clinical Complexity Score (ECCS). Inclusion of these codes in an episode's additional diagnoses list does not increase DRG complexity or cost weight.
_meta.scaffold_status: PARTIAL — 7 named codes from Appendix A Table A5 are fully encoded. Full 47-code list requires AR-DRG V11.0 Definitions Manual Appendix C (unconditional and conditional exclusion code lists).

exclusion_principles.description: Guiding principles for DCL exclusion, per AR-DRG V11.0 governance framework
principles: Codes that reflect pre-existing conditions not associated with incremental resource use during the episode
Codes that represent administrative, surveillance, or screening concepts rather than active clinical conditions
Codes with an unexpected increase in assignment rate over time suggestive of coding inflation rather than genuine clinical complexity
Codes where statistical analysis shows no significant association with higher episode cost within the ADRG
Socioeconomic and psychosocial codes (Z55–Z65, Z74, Z76) — considered pre-disposing factors, not clinical complexity drivers

unconditional_exclusions.description: Codes always excluded from DCL assignment regardless of other diagnoses in the episode.
unconditional_exclusions.count_total_v11: 47 — full list in AR-DRG V11.0 Definitions Manual Appendix C

codes.exclusion_reason: Reflects a background clinical state, not incremental resource use during the episode. Statistically not associated with higher costs within ADRGs.
codes.source: AR-DRG V11.0 Appendix A Table A5

codes.description: Other specified disorders involving the immune mechanism, not elsewhere classified
codes.exclusion_reason: Broad catch-all category with heterogeneous clinical presentations. Not a consistent driver of episode complexity.
codes.source: AR-DRG V11.0 Appendix A Table A5

codes.description: Deficiency of other specified B group vitamins
codes.exclusion_reason: Incidental nutritional finding. Commonly coded as a background condition without driving additional resource use in the episode.
codes.source: AR-DRG V11.0 Appendix A Table A5

codes.exclusion_reason: Common incidental finding. Presence does not reliably predict higher episode cost across ADRGs. Frequently coded without active treatment.
codes.source: AR-DRG V11.0 Appendix A Table A5

codes.description: Muscle wasting and atrophy, not elsewhere classified, multiple sites
codes.exclusion_reason: Reflects chronic baseline state rather than acute episode complexity. Not associated with materially higher resource use within ADRGs.
codes.source: AR-DRG V11.0 Appendix A Table A5

codes.exclusion_reason: Surveillance and infection-control administrative code. Presence indicates organism resistance status for infection control purposes, not a driver of episode clinical complexity.
codes.source: AR-DRG V11.0 Appendix A Table A5

code_ranges.exclusion_reason: Administrative and surveillance codes documenting antimicrobial resistance status. These are infection control flags, not indicators of higher clinical complexity or resource use within an episode.
code_ranges.source: AR-DRG V11.0 Appendix A Table A5
code_ranges.note: Treat as unconditional exclusion for all codes Z14.x, Z15.x, Z16.x

unconditional_exclusions.scaffold_note: The 7 codes above are confirmed from Appendix A Table A5. The remaining 40 codes in the full V11.0 exclusion set are documented in AR-DRG V11.0 Definitions Manual Appendix C. Add them to this array using the same schema when the Definitions Manual is available.

conditional_exclusions.description: Codes excluded from DCL assignment only when specific other diagnoses are present in the episode. Conditionality logic is defined per code pair.
conditional_exclusions.count_total_v11: See AR-DRG V11.0 Definitions Manual Appendix C for full conditional exclusion list
conditional_exclusions.scaffold_note: Conditional exclusion codes require the Definitions Manual. Schema below shows the required structure for each entry when added.

schema_template.icd_code: string — the code being conditionally excluded

condition_codes: list of ICD codes that trigger the exclusion
excluded_when.condition_description: plain-language description of when exclusion applies

previously_excluded_categories.description: Socioeconomic and psychosocial codes excluded since V8.0. Listed here for completeness and to prevent re-inclusion errors.

code_ranges.description: Problems related to education and literacy
Problems related to employment and unemployment
Problems related to housing and economic circumstances
Problems related to negative life events in childhood
Other problems related to primary support group
Problems related to certain psychosocial circumstances
Problems related to other psychosocial circumstances
Persons encountering health services in other circumstances

covid19_dcl_inclusions.description: ICD-10-AM Twelfth Edition COVID-19 emergency use codes INCLUDED in the V11.0 complexity model. These are in-scope for DCL assignment. Separate from exclusions — listed here for co-location with the exclusion file for easy module lookup.
covid19_dcl_inclusions.source: AR-DRG V11.0 Section 3.8 and Appendix A Table A6

codes.description: Multisystem inflammatory syndrome associated with coronavirus disease 2019 [COVID-19]
